catalog_row.ModelType: Small estimated New Keynesian adaptive-learning model; log-linear/model(linear)
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Subjective expectations; constant-gain learning; habit formation; inflation indexation; Taylor rule; natural-rate and cost-push shocks

status_row.notes: Paper-side equations extracted from Markdown; forecast formula dimensioning and unprinted state-space matrices need source-level review. Dynare was not run.

validation.check: English derivation has exact eight required sections and includes (F1)
English and Chinese F-number occurrence counts match

unresolved_issues: Forecast formula dimensioning in Eq. 11 should be checked because Markdown prints I_5 while Z_t is defined as three-dimensional.
State-space matrices are not printed in the Markdown and were not reconstructed.
Implementation policy-rule wrapper differs from the simple paper Taylor rule and is recorded only as implementation_cross_check.
Dynare/runtime validation was not performed by request.
Raw PDF body was not read by default; only existence and hash were recorded.
